step_rationale: Antioxidant stress-response enzyme; altered post-MI; immunoregulatory in ischemic repair.
mechanism: HO-1 acts as a systemic oxidative-stress and inflammation-resolution marker, with dysregulated expression post-MI affecting vascular recovery.
